summary: Verified plan-based feature gating for Capital Care AI across Free, Pro, and Elite plans. Backend: 58/58 pytest cases passed (6 new plan-gating tests + 24 phase2-4 regression + 28 phase1 regression). Frontend: validated free-plan lock icons on all 11 locked tiles + unlocked Jars; Pro-plan CTA and href; Elite-plan CTA and href; PlanGate on /investments and /budgets for free; PlanGate on /investments but budgets loads normally for pro; all tiles navigate for elite; pricing page correctly shows Current Plan / Upgrade to Pro / Go Elite per plan; Stripe window.open URL verified (Elite link matches exact spec with prefilled_email).
critical_code_review_comments: UpgradeModal has absolute-positioned close button (top-4 right-4) but the parent is a flex column without relative positioning — the close button actually positions relative to the fixed full-screen overlay, which places it in the top-right corner of the viewport instead of the sheet card. Works on desktop but looks off on mobile.

Plan badge renders user.plan value in lowercase ('pro', 'elite', 'free') — relies on Tailwind text-transform:uppercase CSS class for display. If the class is missing in some viewports the badge will show lowercase.

PlanGate's 'window.history.back()' inside onClose can leave user stranded if they opened the route directly as first navigation (history.back() is a no-op). Consider navigating to /dashboard explicitly.

Stripe webhook amount-matching uses hardcoded cents (499/999, etc.) — if Stripe prices change OR currency differs (e.g. INR), plan auto-assignment will silently fail and log a warning but not notify the user.
server.py is now 1668 lines — grown 47 lines this phase; still monolithic. Recommend splitting into routers.
test_credentials: admin@capitalcare.ai / Admin@123 — reset to plan='free', subscription_status='inactive' after testing.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data created. Temporarily set admin.plan to 'pro' then 'elite' during testing, reset back to 'free' at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To test plan-specific views, directly update MongoDB users.plan and re-login: `db.users.updateOne({email:'admin@capitalcare.ai'},{\$set:{plan:'pro'}})`. Login response includes plan + subscription_status fields. PricingPage buttons use window.open('_blank') — intercept via `await page.evaluate(() => { window.open = (u,t) => window.__openUrls.push({url:u,target:t}); })` to capture URLs. data-testids confirmed: plan-badge, upgrade-modal, upgrade-title, upgrade-cta, close-modal, plan-gate-screen, quick-{feature} tiles.
rca of the issue: No issues. All 17 review items from the request explicitly verified: login+me+refresh-plan return plan/subscription_status (API-tested); Stripe URLs are exact match (https://buy.stripe.com/14AbJ3akQ9HCgDB8U4bbG02 for Pro, https://buy.stripe.com/4gMeVffFa3jecnlfisbbG03 for Elite, both with ?prefilled_email=admin%40capitalcare.ai); all three plan tiers verified for tile lock-state, modal copy, direct-route PlanGate, and pricing-page CTA behavior.
